game_meta.name: NBA 2K
game_meta.tagline: Basketball simulation. Player-controlled (MyCareer / Pro-Am) or team-controlled (MyTeam, Play Now).
game_meta.character_vocab: builds — Point Guard (Playmaker / 3-Level Scorer), Shooting Guard, Small Forward (Slasher), Power Forward (2-Way Lockdown), Center (Glass Cleaner / Stretch Big)
game_meta.round_format: 4 quarters x 8-12 minutes. Real-time minutes only in MyTeam Limited.
key_mechanics: Shot meter timing — green release = guaranteed make at high stats
Pick and roll execution — pass, dive, fade reads
Stamina management — sprinting drains, affects shot %
Set plays + freelance offense — running designed actions
Badges system — passive boosts to specific actions (Catch & Shoot, Limitless Range, etc.)

mycareer.name: MyCareer / The City
mycareer.notes: Online open-world hub with Rec Center 5v5, Park 3v3, Pro-Am.

myteam.name: MyTeam
myteam.notes: Card collection mode. Triple Threat 3v3, Unlimited 5v5, Limited weekend.

play-now.name: Play Now Online
play-now.notes: Direct online 5v5 with real NBA teams.

PG Playmaker.notes: High ball-handle + pass accuracy. Sets up team.

SF Slasher.notes: Drives the lane. Posters + dunk packages.

rookie: Shooting outside green window every time
No defensive stance on ball — getting blown by
Spamming dribble moves without setting up shot
starter: Bad pick-and-roll reads — picking wrong defender side
Forcing 3s instead of mid-range with high mid-range stats
veteran: Sub-optimal play calling vs defensive matchup
Bad fatigue management — running starters into 4th quarter
Wrong badge load-out for build archetype

review_template.style: Specific over generic. Reference visible HUD elements, in-game timers, and concrete tactical concepts. Never say "play smart" or "use abilities better".

vocabulary: standard tactical vocabulary varies by game; defer to game_meta.character_vocab and key_mechanics for terms
